name: Brahma
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Brahma is a crown that unifies — Four faces; under Sun; in Pisces; with XX Judgment.
flowText: Brahma is a crown that unifies — Four faces; under Sun; in Pisces; with XX Judgment.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Diamond
related.teaser: Crown is the open sky—pure presence pervading all forms.

related.name: Ouranos
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Metatron
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Sophia
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Clear Quartz
related.teaser: Crown is the open sky—pure presence pervading all forms.

related.name: 👑 Crown (Sahasrara)
related.teaser: Crown is the thousand-petaled gate — radiance of spirit, merging with infinity.

related.name: Apollo
related.teaser: Apollo is a crown that unifies — Sun disk; under Sun; in Leo; with XIX The Sun.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.
